zotero.abstractNote: The development of new optimization algorithms for deep learning is a central topic in machine learning research. However, comparing new methods to the state-of-the-art is difficult because results are often reported on different tasks, with different hyperparameter tuning budgets, and different software frameworks. To address this, we introduce DeepOBS, a Deep Learning Optimizer Benchmark Suite. DeepOBS provides a standardized collection of deep learning problems, including data sets, models, and loss functions, that are representative of modern deep learning research. It is built on top of TensorFlow and provides a unified interface for benchmarking optimizers. We demonstrate the utility of DeepOBS by benchmarking several popular optimizers on a variety of tasks.
